Home.title: The artifact registry for
Home.subtitle: Discover, share and manage skills, MCPs, templates and configurations for your AI tools.
Home.statTypesDesc: Skills, MCPs, Templates, Configs and Hooks
Home.statToolsDesc: Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI and more
Home.artifactsSubtitle: Everything you need to supercharge your AI coding tools
Home.skillsDesc: SKILL.md instructions for AI assistants. Share best practices, workflows and specialized knowledge.
Home.mcpDesc: Ready-to-use MCP server configurations. Connect your tools to APIs and external services.
Home.templatesDesc: Pre-configured artifact bundles. Initialize projects quickly with everything you need.
Home.configsDesc: Configuration files for AI tools. Standardize settings across teams and projects.
Home.hooksDesc: Automation scripts for AI tool events. Execute actions before, during or after operations.
Home.step1Desc: Create and publish your artifacts to the registry with a simple command.
Home.step2Desc: Install community artifacts directly into your project.
Home.step3Desc: Contribute to the community and help other developers.
Home.ctaDesc: Explore community artifacts or publish your own. 100% open source, forever.

Explore.title: Explore Artifacts
Explore.subtitle: Discover skills, MCPs, templates and configurations from the community.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.noTokens: No tokens created. Use the CLI or create one here.
Dashboard.createTokenDesc: Tokens allow access via CLI and API. The token will only be shown once.
Dashboard.tokenCreateError: Error creating token. Please try again.
Dashboard.tokenCreatedSuccess: Token created successfully! Copy it now, it won't be shown again.
Dashboard.tokenWarning: Warning: this token will not be shown again. Store it in a safe place.

Publish.title: Publish Artifact
Publish.subtitle: Create and publish a new artifact for the community.
Publish.nameHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. E.g.: my-awesome-skill
Publish.nameValidation: Must start and end with a letter or number, using only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
Publish.typeHint: Select the type that best describes your artifact.
Publish.descHint: A brief description of what your artifact does.
Publish.keywordsHint: Add tags to make it easier to find. Press Enter or comma to add. Max 10.
Publish.keywordsPlaceholder: Type a keyword and press Enter...
Publish.toolsHint: Select the tools compatible with your artifact.
Publish.cliAlternative: You can also publish via CLI:
Publish.errorNameInvalid: Invalid name. Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
Publish.errorDescTooShort: Description must be at least 10 characters.
Publish.errorToolRequired: Select at least one target tool.
Publish.errorNotAuth: You need to be authenticated to publish.
Publish.errorNoUsername: Set a username in your profile before publishing.
Publish.errorExists: An artifact with this name already exists in your scope.
